name: Legendary Knight
short_description: The enemy is invading your lands, and only the Legendary Knight, the king himself, can rally his forces to stand against them. As both ruler and commander, you must lead your army, fortify defenses, and push back relentless waves of invaders to safeguard your kingdom.
detailed_description:
"Defend your kingdom. Protect the sacred statues. Lead your knights to victory."

The enemy is invading your lands, and only the Legendary Knight, the king himself, can rally his forces to stand against them. As both ruler and commander, you must lead your army, fortify defenses, and push back relentless waves of invaders to safeguard your kingdom.

Core Gameplay

Take control of the king and command your forces in strategic real-time battles. Every decision matters:

  • Defend the statues that represent your kingdom’s ruling power

  • Fight alongside your knights to repel endless enemy waves

  • Manage resources wisely to strengthen your army and upgrade your defenses

Build, Train & Strategize

Before each battle, carefully prepare for the enemy assault:

  • Purchase powerful items to boost your combat strength

  • Train soldiers to improve their effectiveness in battle

  • Assign generals and units to defend key buildings

  • Learn new skills using experience gained on the battlefield to enhance your king and troops

Game Modes & Content

Choose your challenge and test your strategies:

  • Classic Mode → Includes 3 unique maps with up to 40 intense waves

  • Endless Mode → Survive as long as you can against an unstoppable horde

  • 5 Playable Heroes → Each with unique abilities

  • +1 DLC Hero available for even greater variety

Difficulty & Replayability

Victory won’t come easy — one mistake could cost you everything:

  • If the sacred statue is destroyed or the king falls, defeat is immediate

  • Master different heroes, upgrades, and strategies to adapt to tougher enemies

  • Challenge yourself to survive longer, unlock new skills, and refine your tactics

supported_languages:
English*, Traditional Chinese*, Simplified Chinese*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
